name: Carrot-Raisin Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325 degrees F (165 degrees C).
2. Grease a 9 X 5-inch loaf pan and set it aside.
3. In a large bowl, stir together the whole wheat flour, unbleached flour, baking soda, baking powder, salt, nutmeg, and cinnamon.
4. In a medium bowl, combine the eggs, honey, yogurt, and oil.
5. Add to the dry mixture and stir until well blended.
6. Stir in the shredded carrots and chopped raisins.
7. Bake in the preheated oven for 45 to 50 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Cool in the pan for 10 minutes, then turn out onto a cooling rack to finish cooling.
